summary: Complete testing of two new features: 1) Edit Project - Task Reassignment, 2) Recurring Task Creation. All backend API tests passed (16/16). Frontend UI tests verified both features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Edit Project - Task Reassignment): PUT /api/projects/{project_id}/tasks/{task_id} endpoint correctly updates task assignee with proper validation
Feature 2 (Recurring Tasks): POST /api/tasks with is_recurring=true correctly generates child task instances with parent_recurring_id set
Frontend CreateTask.js has all required recurring task UI elements: toggle checkbox, frequency dropdown with 8 options, conditional fields for weekly/custom_day_of_month/custom_day_of_week
Frontend Projects.js Edit Project modal shows 'Existing Tasks' section with assignee dropdown per task (data-testid='existing-task-assignee-{task_id}')
Backend generate_recurring_dates() helper correctly handles all recurrence types: daily, weekly, fortnightly, monthly, half_yearly, annually, custom_day_of_month, custom_day_of_week
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features fully tested and working: 1) Edit Project modal allows partners to change task assignees via dropdown - each existing task has a select element with data-testid='existing-task-assignee-{task_id}'. 2) Create Task page has recurring task toggle (data-testid='recurring-toggle') that reveals frequency dropdown with 8 options. Backend correctly generates child task instances with parent_recurring_id. Existing project 'test' (id: 17d58899-a0c5-4a81-ae08-fe76616a0d63) has 3 tasks for testing reassignment.

frontend_tests: Edit Project modal opens from project dropdown menu
Existing Tasks section displays 3 tasks with assignee dropdowns
Successfully changed task 'BS' assignee from 'Sonu kanwar' to 'Nitish Das'
Frequency dropdown appears when toggle enabled
All 8 frequency options available: Daily, Weekly, Fortnightly, Monthly, Half Yearly, Annually, Specific Date of Every Month, Specific Day of Week(s)
Weekly option shows day of week selector
custom_day_of_week shows day selector + every N weeks input
